title: Slovakian Crumble Potato Bake
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring crumble-topped potatoes, perfect for a satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes and melted butter. Toss to coat.
Transfer the potatoes to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix Slovakian crumble and crumbly. Set aside.
Top the potatoes with the crumble mixture, spreading evenly.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
